allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\sdk" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\sdk"\)\) { Write-Host "No SDK directory found" })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022"\) { Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022" -Directory | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.FullName } } else { Write-Host "No VS 2022 found" }; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022"\) { Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022" -Directory } else { Write-Host "No VS 2022 \(x86\) found" })
